readings.Aries: You are not too much. You are, however, misdirected. Adjust the trajectory. Saying less will move this further than saying more.
readings.Taurus: The material world gives you information that others miss. Pay attention to it today. The energy available today is better used gently.
readings.Gemini: Your natural frequency is connection. Right now you need a little deliberate silence. This situation responds well to direct engagement.
readings.Cancer: Your memory is long and your feelings longer. Not everything from before applies to now. The window for this is shorter than it looks.
readings.Leo: There's a narrative about yourself you've been carrying that flatters you in the wrong direction. The first instinct was right.
readings.Virgo: There is a small pleasure available to you right now that your efficiency has been routing around. Take it. There's more support available than you've asked for.
readings.Libra: The harmony you've created has required you to disappear into it. Reappear. Something you've been measuring incorrectly just corrected itself.
readings.Scorpio: The fear and the want are the same object viewed from different angles. Turn it. Saying less will move this further than saying more.
readings.Sagittarius: Something you said to yourself about your limitations is not accurate. Recalibrate. The first instinct was right.
readings.Capricorn: You've been leading quietly. Someone around you needs you to lead out loud. The question matters more than the answer right now.
readings.Aquarius: The thing you're resisting because it seems too normal — normal isn't the problem. Examine the actual resistance. The answer that feels too obvious is probably the actual answer.
readings.Pisces: What you're calling chaos is actually pattern — you can see it if you look from further away. Say the thing you've been rehearsing.

Aries-Aries.synthesis: You both arrived wanting to lead. The negotiation of who does is where most of the energy goes.

Aries-Taurus.synthesis: The slow materials and the fast energy can build something neither could alone. Patience is required from the fire.

Aries-Gemini.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Cancer.synthesis: The intensity is real. Whether it's connection or pressure depends on which day you're asking.

Aries-Leo.synthesis: The warmth is real. So is the risk that you start competing over it rather than sharing it.

Aries-Virgo.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Aries-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Scorpio.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Aries-Sagittarius.synthesis: Together you are louder, brighter, and harder to ignore. Whether that's what you need is a different question.

Aries-Capricorn.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Aries-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Pisces.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Taurus-Taurus.synthesis: Shared values make for comfort. They also make it easier to avoid the conversation you keep not having.

Taurus-Gemini.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Taurus-Cancer.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Taurus-Leo.synthesis: Something transformative is possible here — if neither of you insists on doing it alone.

Taurus-Virgo.synthesis: You recognise each other's methods. Whether that familiarity breeds trust or contempt is up to you.

Taurus-Libra.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Taurus-Scorpio.synthesis: You move at similar speeds, value similar things. That similarity is either comfort or camouflage.

Taurus-Sagittarius.synthesis: Something transformative is possible here — if neither of you insists on doing it alone.

Taurus-Capricorn.synthesis: Shared values make for comfort. They also make it easier to avoid the conversation you keep not having.

Taurus-Aquarius.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Taurus-Pisces.synthesis: You move at similar speeds, value similar things. That similarity is either comfort or camouflage.

Gemini-Gemini.synthesis: You're rarely bored together. Occasionally you're frustrated by the inability to just be still.

Gemini-Cancer.synthesis: You're both drawn to what the other has access to. Whether you can access it in each other is the question.

Gemini-Leo.synthesis: The air feeds the fire, the fire warms the air. You both tend to enjoy this too much to notice when it tips.

Gemini-Virgo.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Gemini-Libra.synthesis: You understand each other at a speed that feels like recognition. Familiarity this fast always hides something.

Gemini-Scorpio.synthesis: The connection is real and confusing to both of you. You're not sure how it works. It works anyway.

Gemini-Sagittarius.synthesis: You accelerate each other. The direction you're heading is worth establishing before you reach full speed.

Gemini-Capricorn.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Gemini-Aquarius.synthesis: Together you can analyse anything. The one thing neither of you wants to analyse is this.

Gemini-Pisces.synthesis: You're both drawn to what the other has access to. Whether you can access it in each other is the question.

Cancer-Cancer.synthesis: Nobody outside this pairing fully understands what happens inside it. That's exactly how you want it.

Cancer-Leo.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Cancer-Virgo.synthesis: The support here is genuine and sometimes suffocating. The line between them is worth watching.

Cancer-Libra.synthesis: The mismatch in how you process things is a feature in good times and a fault line in bad ones.

Cancer-Scorpio.synthesis: Nobody outside this pairing fully understands what happens inside it. That's exactly how you want it.

Cancer-Sagittarius.synthesis: The intensity is real. Whether it's connection or pressure depends on which day you're asking.

Cancer-Capricorn.synthesis: The support here is genuine and sometimes suffocating. The line between them is worth watching.

Cancer-Aquarius.synthesis: You make each other think differently — one about the world, one about themselves. That's not nothing.

Cancer-Pisces.synthesis: Nobody outside this pairing fully understands what happens inside it. That's exactly how you want it.

Leo-Leo.synthesis: Neither of you knows how to be small around the other. Decide if that's exhilarating or just exhausting.

Leo-Virgo.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Leo-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Scorpio.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Leo-Sagittarius.synthesis: You give each other permission to be more yourselves. Sometimes that permission is exactly the problem.

Leo-Capricorn.synthesis: The slow materials and the fast energy can build something neither could alone. Patience is required from the fire.

Leo-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Pisces.synthesis: The intensity is real. Whether it's connection or pressure depends on which day you're asking.

Virgo-Virgo.synthesis: You anchor each other well. Make sure neither of you has quietly agreed to stop moving entirely.

Virgo-Libra.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Virgo-Scorpio.synthesis: You care for each other in ways that are practical and non-intrusive. Neither says much. Both notice everything.

Virgo-Sagittarius.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Virgo-Capricorn.synthesis: The practical language between you is fluent and efficient. The emotional one takes more effort from both.

Virgo-Aquarius.synthesis: You each think the other is slightly impractical, and you're both right about each other, and wrong.

Virgo-Pisces.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Libra-Libra.synthesis: You make each other sharper. You also make each other better at avoiding the things words can't fix.

Libra-Scorpio.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Libra-Sagittarius.synthesis: Something about this combination feels irresistible to both of you. That irresistibility is worth examining.

Libra-Capricorn.synthesis: The ideas need grounding. The ground needs ideas. Neither of you finds this as obvious as it sounds.

Libra-Aquarius.synthesis: Intellectually, this is effortless. Emotionally, you're both still waiting for the other to go first.

Libra-Pisces.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Scorpio-Scorpio.synthesis: You absorb each other's moods completely. Make sure the current is flowing in a direction you chose.

Scorpio-Sagittarius.synthesis: You affect each other immediately and completely. That's not always comfortable and not always harmful.

Scorpio-Capricorn.synthesis: The foundation feels natural because it is. What gets built on top of it requires more deliberate attention.

Scorpio-Aquarius.synthesis: You make each other think differently — one about the world, one about themselves. That's not nothing.

Scorpio-Pisces.synthesis: Nobody outside this pairing fully understands what happens inside it. That's exactly how you want it.

Sagittarius-Sagittarius.synthesis: You recognised each other immediately. Whether that's good news depends entirely on what you recognised.

Sagittarius-Capricorn.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Sagittarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Sagittarius-Pisces.synthesis: The heat and the depth exist in real tension. That tension is the most honest thing between you.

Capricorn-Capricorn.synthesis: You recognise each other's methods. Whether that familiarity breeds trust or contempt is up to you.

Capricorn-Aquarius.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Capricorn-Pisces.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Aquarius-Aquarius.synthesis: You both live a little inside your heads. When you're together, the heads get very crowded.

Aquarius-Pisces.synthesis: You make each other think differently — one about the world, one about themselves. That's not nothing.

Pisces-Pisces.synthesis: The emotional fluency here is extraordinary. The risk is drowning in it before finding solid ground.

calculation_methods: Planetary longitudes: Jean Meeus 'Astronomical Algorithms' low-precision formulae (±1° accuracy)
Retrograde: computed from direction of longitude change vs previous day
Aspects: angular separation with standard orbs (conjunction 8°, sextile 6°, square/trine/opposition 8°, quincunx 3°)
Compatibility: element harmony base score + modality adjustment + date-seeded variance
Daily readings: deterministic date-seed (PRNG) selects from 60-entry per-sign pools + 30-entry suffix pool; 1,800 combinations per sign
